message:
feat(e2e): mt-mvcc-bench multi-threaded MVCC benchmark (IMPL-4a)

Spawns N threads each with its own Connection to a shared file-backed
DB, measures real concurrent-writer throughput vs C SQLite WAL mode.
Unblocks IMPL-4/14/15/16/17/24 which need real MT measurement to
motivate adoption.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
